attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Files With System Process Name In Unsuspected Locations
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects the creation of an executable with a system process name in folders other than the system ones (System32, SysWOW64, etc.).
It is highly recommended to perform an initial baseline before using this rule in production.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Sander Wiebing, Tim Shelton, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET TOR Known Tor Relay/Router (Not Exit) Node Traffic group 227
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp [170.133.2.81,170.39.49.50,170.64.129.106,170.64.137.108,170.64.144.2,170.64.202.213,170.64.203.139,171.22.79.251,171.25.193.9,171.66.3.87] any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"ET TOR Known Tor Relay/Router (Not Exit) Node Traffic group 227"; reference:url,doc.emergingthreats.net/bin/view/Main/TorRules; threshold: type limit, track by_src, seconds 60, count 1; classtype:misc-attack; flowbits:set,ET.TorIP; sid:2522226; rev:6065; metadata:affected_product Any, attack_target Any, deployment Perimeter, tag TOR, signature_severity Informational, created_at 2008_12_01, updated_at 2025_11_04;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET POLICY TLS possible TOR SSL traffic
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp any ![21,25,110,143,443,465,587,636,989:995,5061,5222,8443] -> any any (msg:"ET POLICY TLS possible TOR SSL traffic"; flow:established,from_server; tls.cert_issuer; content:"CN=www"; startswith; content:".com"; endswith; pcre:"/^CN=www\.[0-9a-z]{8,20}\.com$/"; tls.cert_subject; content:"CN=www"; startswith; content:".net"; endswith; pcre:"/^CN=www\.[0-9a-z]{8,20}\.net$/"; classtype:misc-activity; sid:2018789; rev:4; metadata:created_at 2014_07_28, confidence High, signature_severity Informational, updated_at 2023_02_16;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET JA3 Hash - [Abuse.ch] Possible Troldesh Ransomware
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET JA3 Hash - [Abuse.ch] Possible Troldesh Ransomware"; ja3_hash; content:"1be3ecebe5aa9d3654e6e703d81f6928"; reference:url,sslbl.abuse.ch/ja3-fingerprints/; classtype:unknown; sid:2028760; rev:2; metadata:attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2019_10_14, deployment Perimeter, confidence Low, signature_severity Major, tag Ransomware, tag Description_Generated_By_Proofpoint_Nexus, updated_at 2019_10_29, mitre_tactic_id TA0040, mitre_tactic_name Impact, mitre_technique_id T1486, mitre_technique_name Data_Encrypted_for_Impact;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: SSLBL: Malicious JA3 SSL-Client Fingerprint detected (Ransomware.Troldesh)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls any any -> any any (msg:"SSLBL: Malicious JA3 SSL-Client Fingerprint detected (Ransomware.Troldesh)"; ja3_hash; content:"1be3ecebe5aa9d3654e6e703d81f6928"; reference:url, sslbl.abuse.ch/ja3-fingerprints/1be3ecebe5aa9d3654e6e703d81f6928/; sid:906200064; rev:1;)
